subject: [RFC v2 07/21] mm: thp: retry on split failure in change_pmd_range()

2026-02-26.patch_summary: This patch proposes a change to the mm/mprotect.c file, specifically in the change_pmd_range() function. The goal is to handle split failures more robustly by retrying the operation after yielding the CPU and allowing other tasks to free memory.
